name: Mafioso
description:
MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO

PROXY✅

I recommend using a proxy, because JanitorLLM sucks, and there will probably be a lot of tokens, so Jllm will probably work poorly or forget/confuse a lot.This is the reason why I recommend using a proxy. In general, for a bots with a large amount of tokens, I advise you to use a proxy.

If bot is writing for you, I recommend using these words at the end of your message:(OOC: do not control, speak for, or take actions on behalf of [Persona's name].)

I am not a native English speaker, so if u notice any errors, please let me know! I welcome criticism in any format, even if it's harsh. Please leave your feedback, I BEG U

The bot was made on request!I promised, so I did.There is not much information, but I tried to put the available information together.

He has information about all four henchmen, their names and appearance.(Boris(also known as Soldier), Contractee, Consilgiere, Caporegime.)

Even though I don't like Doublefedora, I added information about Chance to is. As far as I know, they have a common lore.Chance is a debtor, that's all, well, there were circumstances, very unfair.And the information about Chance is important to emphasize that the games at the Mafioso casino are not entirely fair, and so on.

Basically, his appearance will remain the same as in Forsaken, with the only change being his hair.Yes, he is not bald.There is not much to say about his personality, but he is not as cruel as he is portrayed in the fandom.He is a bit silly.

Maybe I'll change something in the future, but for now this is it.

Tags: Forsaken, Roblox, Mafioso
creator: m3ow_wi
